# Contribution Matrix

- IRB
  - Admin
  - Strategy
  - Writing
  - Review / Edit
- Experiments
  - Design
  - Administration
  - Conduct
  - Recruitment
- Data
  - Collection
  - Analysis
- SW
  - Direction
  - Development

Sesek
Harris
Evans
Mykoniatis
Victoria Ballard
Md Monir Hossain
Diego Roberto Caputo Rodriguez
Alex Barras
David “Brown” Teague
Carson Tillery
Kralyn Thomas
